products.description:
Ingco 20V Lithium-Ion Battery – 8.0Ah
Product Details:

Voltage: 20V

Capacity: 8.0Ah

Battery Type: Lithium-Ion

LED Power Indicator: Displays remaining charge

Compatibility:

Fits all Ingco 20V tools

Also compatible with all Total 20V tools (cross-brand compatibility)

Key Benefits:

High Capacity: Twice the runtime of a 4.0Ah battery — ideal for heavy-duty or extended use

Universal Fit: One battery system for a wide range of cordless tools (Ingco & Total)

Battery Status Indicator: Easily monitor remaining power on the job

...more...less
products.name: Battery 20V 8ah Ingco FBLI2108
